title: TurnPlan
description: Output of the decision step (deterministic code, no LLM). Assembles which facets are active, how to deliver, where to route, and the action on the conversation line.

facet_weights.description: Per-facet activation weight in [0,1] = base affinity + topic relevance + temperament shift, clamped. Internal-only facets modify content but never become the voice.

target_length.description: Within the user envelope; where to sit per the daily fluctuation.

tone.description: Colored by Layer 2 within the envelope.

route.description: simple -> Haiku; deep -> one weighted Opus call.

filler.description: Short filler emitted immediately on a deep turn while Opus prepares.

confirmation.description: Whether to confirm before an irreversible action.

conversation_line_action.description: What to do with the line this turn.

self_check.description: Route factual claims to a cheap verification call (roadmap refinement #2).
